name: Alkyl Amines Chemicals Limited
summary: Alkyl Amines Chemicals Limited manufactures and supplies amines, amine derivatives, and other specialty chemicals in India and internationally. The company offers aliphatic amine products, such as methylamine, ethylamine, isopropylamine, propylamine, butylamine, ethylhexylamine, and cyclohexylamine; amine derivatives, including amides, hydrochlorides, and mixed amines; and fine chemicals. It also provides contract services comprising technology and product development, and scale-up services, as well as custom manufacturing support services. The company serves various industries, such as pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, water treatment chemicals, rubber chemicals, paint and dyes, etc. Alkyl Amines Chemicals Limited was incorporated in 1979 and is based in Mumbai, India.
